name: Country Rhubarb Dessert
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fresh rhubarb, washed and cut into 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the flour and softened butter until they resemble coarse crumbs. Add confectioner's sugar. Mix well.
2. Press the mixture into a buttered 9-inch square pan or 10 x 7 x 1/2-inch rectangular pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes until golden brown.
4. While the crust is baking, beat eggs in a bowl. Gradually add 1 1/4 cups sugar, beating until very light and fluffy (5 minutes on High with an electric mixer).
5. At low speed, add flour, baking powder, vanilla, and salt to the egg mixture. Mix well.
6. Gently fold in the rhubarb pieces using a spatula.
7. Pour the batter evenly over the baked crust.
8. Bake at 350°F for another 40 minutes until light brown and the top feels dry.
9. Serve cooled with whipped cream and strawberries.
